projects.title: Прогулка По Пляжу
projects.description: Создание 3D-модели и плаката в стиле мультфильмов студии Pixar Animation Studios.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

Создание 3D-модели и плаката в стиле мультфильмов студии Pixar. Персонаж должен быть похож по внешности и характеру на дочь заказчика. Основные требования: пляжный песок, яркое освещение, счастливое выражение лица, воздушные шары, ракушки, морские звезды...


Софт:

Zbrush, Blender, Adobe Photoshop



Первым шагом было найти фотографию дочери клиента и набросать её лицо и фигуру в мультяшном стиле. Для создания 3D-модели я использовал программу Blender, применив к ней базовые материалы и текстуры. Также я добавил детали волос и одежды, чтобы сделать её более реалистичной.
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: Финальным шагом было добавление несколько воздушных шариков. придание персонажу счастливого и удивленного выражения лица. Я использовала модификатор кривой, чтобы шарики выглядели парящими в воздухе, и прикрепила их к руке персонажа с помощью нитки. Я также скорректировала черты лица и позу персонажа, чтобы она выглядела жизнерадостной и восторженной.

projects.title: Сферы
projects.description: Создание захватывающего 360° видеоконтента, специально разработанного для светодиодных медиасфер, для обеспечения по-настоящему увлекательного и динамичного визуального восприятия.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

Creating video content on the topic of "natural elements" in 360° (VR) format. This would be a great way to showcase the beauty and diversity of nature, as well as to provide an immersive and educational experience for the viewers.
The project would involve using software such as "Blender", "After Effects" and "Premiere Pro" to create realistic and stunning 3D models and animations of various natural elements, such as water, fire, earth, and air.
The final product would be compatible with VR devices and platforms, such as LED Media-Spheres.


Софт:

Blender, Adobe After Effects, Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe Photoshop
projects.TextParalax:
"At the entrance of the building, screen balls are placed under the ceiling, which broadcast 360° of environmental content..."

UNK corporate interiors
projects.fullDescriptionTwo:
"...The architects preferred not to continue the idea of green facades in the interior literally - at the expense of living plants. Therefore, the eco-theme is embodied here by figurative means. The project is based on the idea of biomes (biological environments such as, for example, desert, tundra, ocean, etc.). At the entrance of the building, screen balls are placed under the ceiling, which broadcast 360 degrees of environmental content specially created for the project (each ball has its own biome)." - UNK corporate interiors





Full project review - UNK corporate interiors, Officenext

projects.title: Театр ATX
projects.description: Website design and development for the 'Academy of Theater Arts' with a retro aesthetic inspired by the early 2000s.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
"Theatre ATX (Academy of Theater Arts) - was founded in Russia, Saratov City on November 20, 1988. The first (and only) president (artistic director) of the "Academy" Ivan Ivanovich Verkhovykh, a graduate of the acting department of the I.A. Slonov and the directing department of the Higher Theater School named after B.V. Shchukin. While still an actor of the Saratov Youth Theater, he created three theater studios in Saratov, from which the theater arose over time: eight of the then studio members became a kind of core of the team." - Theatre ATX


ТЗ:

The main idea was to create a website that would look like it was made in the early 2000s, using the tools and techniques that were available at that time. I wanted to recreate the aesthetic and functionality of websites from that era, such as the use of frames, tables, animated GIFs, marquees, pop-ups, and so on.



Софт:

Denwer, Visual Studio Code, CMS Joomla, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop
projects.TextParalax:
"Freedom will become law, and law will become freedom. You will return and never be a slave. Neither you, nor your children."

I. Verkhovoy (Theatre ATX)
projects.fullDescriptionTwo:
The theater's style is influenced by Suprematism and Bauhaus, two artistic movements that emphasized geometric shapes, colors and functionality. I incorporated some elements from these movements into the site design, such as the use of black, white and yellow, the contrast between straight and curved lines, and the balance between form and content. The site has a retro feel, but also a modern touch. It showcases the theater's history, vision and performances in a clear and engaging way.




Photos are taken from the official website of - Theatre ATX

projects.title: Заткнись и Играй
projects.description: Create logo and poster for YouTube channel.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
This project is a comprehensive visual design initiative aimed at creating a distinctive and stylish visual identity for a gaming-focused YouTube channel — "Shut up & game". The scope of the project includes the development of a logo, a poster, and various visual elements using professional design tools such as Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop.



Софт:

Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: The primary goal of this project is to establish a bold and memorable brand style that effectively conveys the channel's gaming theme, engages the target audience, and helps it stand out in the competitive world of gaming media.

projects.title: Планета, Окутанная Молниями
projects.description: This work spans a series of multimedia projects where motion design, 3D modeling, and graphic design come together to produce visually engaging and technically polished content. Each project is driven by a strong creative vision, technical precision, and a well-structured workflow across industry-standard software tools.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

Produce two intro animations. The first should feature planet Earth being enveloped by lightning bolts that converge to reveal the company logo. The second will serve as a 'viewer recommendation' or disclaimer video.



Софт:

Blender, Adobe After Effects, Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe Photoshop.
projects.fullDescriptionTwo:
DSE Intro - This project is a high-energy intro video developed using Blender, Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, and Photoshop. It follows a frame-by-frame storyboard approach and a clearly defined production pipeline. The result is a powerful visual sequence that blends cinematic 3D animation with dynamic motion graphics and detailed post-production effects.



DSE (Recommendation) - A brand-focused project featuring intro videos and visual recommendations designed to enhance audience engagement. The work highlights the use of cohesive branding, rhythmic editing, and motion-based storytelling to represent the identity of Diamond Sound Entertainment

projects.title: Fallout UI - UFA V Форум
projects.description: Fallout UI/UX design: Retrofuturistic forum design with custom animations for Proboards.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
"Fallout is a series of post-apocalyptic role-playing video games and later action role-playing games created by Interplay Entertainment. The series is set during the 21st, 22nd and 23rd centuries, and its atompunk retrofuturistic setting and art work are influenced by the post-war culture of 1950s United States, with its combination of hope for the promises of technology and the lurking fear of nuclear annihilation." - wikipedia.org



ТЗ:

To develop a visual design for a forum page in the Fallout aesthetic (retropunk/post-apocalyptic). The design should incorporate signature elements such as intricate wiring, terminal displays, radio equipment, and robotics.
Graphic assets adaptation and interface animation tailored for the Proboards Tools engine.



Софт:

Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Visual Studio Code, Proboards tools engine
projects.TextParalax:
"Humanity is so resilient, to cling to life despite all of this"

Fallout (video game)
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: A visual overhaul of a forum pages inspired by the iconic Fallout universe. This project blends a rugged post-apocalyptic aesthetic with modern interface functionality.

projects.title: Звуковой Дизайн
projects.description: A photorealistic digital image of a old Fender Stratocaster guitar connected to a Marshall amplifier, for a poster.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

Develop a photorealistic digital art depicting a old Fender Stratocaster guitar plugged into a Marshall amplifier. The workflow involves creating 3D models and setting up the scene in Blender, then refining the image to perfection using post-processing tools in Photoshop.



Софт:

Blender, Adobe Photoshop
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: Accurate 3D models of the Fender Stratocaster guitar and Marshall amplifier were created. Special attention was paid to the details, from the shape of the guitar body to the texture of the amplifier's vinyl covering and its knobs. The image was refined in Photoshop for maximum photorealism, transforming the 3D render into a complete artistic composition.

projects.title: Глиняная Корова
projects.description: The official web-based storefront for "Claycow", built with a focus on scalable architecture, dynamic inventory management, and a responsive product catalog.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

Created a responsive web application for "Claycow" using WordPress, implementing a bespoke layout aligned with the brand's visual identity and specific client needs. Includes a digital catalog with real-time search functionality.



Софт:

Visual Studio Code, WordPress, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator



The desktop version showcases a wide-screen approach to design: large typography, generous margins, and a clear block hierarchy allow users to easily navigate key sections—from the homepage to product categories and news items.
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: The Claycow mobile version features a lightweight, fast, and intuitive interface optimized for vertical format and gesture control.

projects.title: AV - Создание Логотипа
projects.description: This project focuses on developing a clean, memorable logo built from the initials Vecheslav Ageev. Designed specifically for a professional photographer, the goal was to create a versatile mark that functions perfectly as a watermark. It remains instantly recognizable across any background—from high-contrast portraits to textured landscapes—scales effortlessly, and communicates clarity even from a distance.
projects.fullDescriptionOne:
ТЗ:

To develop a logo based on the initials of the first and last name (Vecheslav Ageev), which will be visible on any background, easy to recognize and read from any distance.



Софт:

Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop
projects.fullDescriptionTwo: Working with Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop, the design process explored geometric forms, contrast, and readability to establish a strong personal brand presence.

projects.title: ИИ Работы
projects.description: This gallery showcases my digital generative artwork, created over a period of time.
projects.fullDescriptionOne: I utilize a wide range of powerful image generation models, such as Flux, SDXL, and many more.

content.secondTitle: Я Сочетаю Творческое Видение С Техническими Навыками Для Создания Функциональных И Эстетически Привлекательных Решений.

experience.title: Безупречное Проектирование и Исполнение
experience.text:
Сочетая дизайн и разработку, я воплощаю концепции в жизнь в виде готовых продуктов.

Моя страсть к обучению делает освоение новых технологий таким же легким и увлекательным, как просмотр любимого сериала.

look.title: Я Смотрю На Вещи Под Несколько Иным Углом.
look.text:
My main areas of focus include:


User Interface (UI) and User Experience (UX) Design: I create intuitive and enjoyable digital products, paying close attention to every detail of the interaction.

Web Development: I specialize in building responsive and high-performance websites and applications using modern technologies.

I love seeing ideas transform into reality, and I'm always eager for new challenges that allow me to learn and grow.

contact.title: Давайте Вместе Расскажем Вашу Следующую Историю.

about.title: Обо Мне
about.description:
Креативный директор, наставник, дизайнер, UX/UI-дизайнер, веб-разработчик, специалист по 3D-визуализации, цифровой художник и промт-инженер



Моя страсть лежит на стыке дизайна и технологий, где я создаю интерактивные, эстетичные и захватывающие впечатления...

Разносторонний и увлеченный своим делом создатель контента, способный справиться с различными аспектами производства цифрового медиаконтента. Будь то разработка потрясающих визуальных эффектов или создание захватывающей моушн-графики.
text: У меня более 11 лет опыта работы в различных областях дизайна, анимации и веб-разработки. Я люблю создавать красивые и привлекательные решения для самых разных проектов, от брендинга и разработки логотипов до моушн-графики и интерактивных веб-сайтов. Я всегда стремлюсь осваивать новые навыки и технологии, чтобы раскрыть свой творческий потенциал и расширить портфолио. Мне нравится сотрудничать с клиентами и партнерами, которые разделяют мое видение и ценности.

text:
